title: ImportTax

amount.description: The total amount of import tax for all line items of an order.

importTaxType.description: An enumeration value that indicates the type of import tax applicable to the order. Currently, the only applicable import tax is the Goods and Services tax (indicated with GST). The Goods and Services tax is only applicable to orders for the eBay Australia marketplace. For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

description: This container defines the type of import tax applicable to the order, and the total amount of tax for all line items in the order.
